properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v3 v6 v7 v7 v8 v3 v3 v9

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Hope has found its home within me Now that I've been found in You Let all that I am be all You want me to be 'Cause all I want is more of You 'Cause all I want is more of You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Let Your presence fall upon us I want to see You face to face Let me live forever lost in Your love, yeah 'Cause all I want is more of You 'Cause all I want is more of You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I'm living for this cause I lay down my life into Your hands I'm living for the truth The hope of the world, in You I'll stand

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Let Your presence fall upon us, Jesus I want to see You face to face Let me live forever lost in Your love, yeah 'Cause all I want is more of You 'Cause all I want is more of You

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: All I want is You All I want is You All I want is You All I want is You

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: All I want is, all I want is You, Jesus All I want is, all I want is You, Jesus All I want is, all I want is You, Jesus All I want is, all I want is You, Jesus

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Let Your presence fall upon us I want to see You face to face Let me live forever lost in Your love, yes 'Cause all I want is more of You 'Cause all I want is more of You

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: 'Cause all I want is You All I want is You All I want is You All I want is You
